title: ALETHEIA Truth Compiler: Complete Blueprint for Information Certification, Evidence DNA, and Truth Discovery
description:
Problem. Digital information in the age of generative AI faces three coupled failures: provenance opacity (where did this come from?), integrity ambiguity (has it been altered?), and overclaimed truth (what can the evidence actually support?). Dashboards and fact-check workflows often treat agreement as warrant even when sources share origins.

Gap. Existing provenance tools track jobs and datasets; content-addressed stores protect bytes; editorial fact-checking relies on process. None combine Evidence DNA, certification-without-truth, and independence-sensitive Truth Receipts that can honestly return CURRENTLY_UNKNOWABLE under shared origins.

Proposed solution. ALETHEIA proposes a local-first, authority-independent architecture for Evidence DNA (content-addressed lineage), Information Certification (integrity and provenance without asserting truth), and Bounded Truth Discovery (contradiction, falsification search, source independence, reproducible receipts).

Key evidence (v3.0.0). This Public Research Edition adds an importable research library (from aletheia import ALETHEIAEngine), Reality Gate PASS (7/7), benchmarks, mutation testing ≥90%, alternative-implementation replication, a scientific false-plurality real-world scenario, and stress tests to 2000 evidence nodes with iterative provenance-depth computation.

Honest limits. ALETHEIA does not claim absolute truth detection, production deployment, peer review, or independent human replication. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21344789. Released for evaluation, citation, and attempted falsification.
notes: Independent Research Publication No. 1. v3.0.0 Public Research Edition upgrade. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21344789. Not peer reviewed. Not independently replicated. Not production. Generative AI tools assisted preparation. Author responsible for content. PDF REGENERATION NEEDED before Zenodo version deposit.
